environment.last_commit: be10034 fix: serve index.html - add outputDirectory + rewrites to vercel.json

critical_errors.issue: model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' — fake model name sent to backend (backend ignores it and uses Gemini, but code is misleading)
Photo Inspector sends image to /api/ai-proxy in Anthropic format — ai-proxy has NO vision handling. vision-proxy.js exists but is NEVER called from frontend
Function named fetchAnthropicAPI() — misleading name. Actually routes to /api/ai-proxy which uses Gemini. Should be renamed
localStorage.getItem('qs_pro_token') — JWT stored in localStorage violates project security rules (should be httpOnly cookie)
Blob-based SW registered first, falls back to real sw.js — dual SW creates potential conflicts
UI warns user API key is in localStorage but saveKey() is in-memory only — confusing UX message

data_content.js.note: ~1MB — may cause slow load on mobile

api/ai-proxy.js.note: Uses gemini-2.0-flash correctly. Fallback to gemini-2.5-flash. No vision handling.

api/vision-proxy.js.note: EXISTS but NEVER called from frontend — dead code. Photo Inspector calls ai-proxy instead.

.env.example.note: Documents GEMINI_KEY, Supabase, JWT_SECRET, PROMO_CODES, APP_URL

sw.js.note: Real file exists but Blob SW in index.html line 4266 takes priority

fake_ai_model.details: Frontend sends 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001' (non-existent model) to backend. Backend ignores and uses Gemini. Misleading but not a runtime crash.

broken_vision_feature.details: Photo Inspector (line 3993) sends Anthropic-format image to /api/ai-proxy which has NO vision support. /api/vision-proxy.js exists with correct Gemini vision code but is never called.

missing_backend.details: All API endpoints exist: ai-proxy.js, qcs-search.js, verify-pro.js, vision-proxy.js, health.js, etc.

missing_calculators.details: 12 calc functions in index.html + 51 in data_calcs.js = 63 total. calcSPT, calcConcrete, calcRebar, calcCover, calcLapLength all in data_calcs.js.

localStorage_api_keys.details: API keys NOT in localStorage — cleanupSecurity() removes them on load. saveKey() is in-memory only. HOWEVER: qs_pro_token JWT IS in localStorage (line 4541).

xss_risk_innerHTML.details: 42 innerHTML assignments found. sanitizeText() exists and is used at some points (e.g., line 1477, 1770) but NOT consistently on all 42. Several inject API response or translation strings without sanitization.

eval_usage.details: No eval() or new Function() found (grep matches were false positives on 'revalidate' and 'evaluation').

blob_service_worker.details: Line 4266 creates Blob SW first, falls back to real sw.js. Dual registration can cause cache conflicts.

misleading_function_names.details: fetchAnthropicAPI() at line 2231 routes to /api/ai-proxy (Gemini). Name should be fetchAIProxy() or similar.

seo.title: QatarSpec Pro — دليل المواصفات القطرية الرسمي | QCS 2024 + Ashghal + KAHRAMAA

issue_list: CRITICAL: Photo Inspector vision feature broken — sends to wrong endpoint
HIGH: claude-haiku fake model name in frontend (2 locations)
HIGH: JWT (qs_pro_token) stored in localStorage instead of httpOnly cookie
HIGH: vision-proxy.js is dead code — never called from frontend
MEDIUM: Blob SW conflicts with real sw.js
MEDIUM: innerHTML not consistently sanitized (42 instances, partial sanitization)
LOW: API key warning message in UI is outdated/confusing
positive_findings: All 14 files exist — no missing files
Backend correctly uses Gemini API (not Anthropic)
API keys NOT in localStorage (cleanup runs on load)
No eval() or new Function() usage
SEO fully configured (title, description, canonical, OG, sitemap, robots)
summary.launch_readiness: NOT READY — 6.5/10. Core functionality works but vision feature is broken, security has JWT localStorage issue, and code has misleading Anthropic references.
